== Notes for [[Item:Q102368|Q102368]] ==

See "My Lines"

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/p106.htm#i12962 )

from Compiler: R. B. Stewart, Evans, GA

( http://homepages.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~cousin/html/index.htm )

----
Father's name was adjusted to that on the above quoted family tree, and based on:

The Jewish Quarterly Review Vol. 31, No. 2, Oct., 1940

JOURNAL ARTICLE The Exilarchate in the Eastern Caliphate, 637-1258 Alexander D. Goode

Available at https://www.jstor.org/stable/1452602

This should be checked against earlier sources.

----

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000000700952054

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
